M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.Main
Launches the JavaFX application.
Main - Class in com.example.escritura_rapida
JavaFX application entry point that initializes navigation and shows the main menu.
Main() - Constructor for class com.example.escritura_rapida.Main
 
MAIN_MENU - Static variable in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.ViewRoutes
Route key for the main menu screen.
MainMenuController - Class in com.example.escritura_rapida.controller
Controller for the main menu view.
MainMenuController() - Constructor for class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.MainMenuController
 
mistakeGameOver() - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
Determines if the game should end due to too many mistakes.
